one_liner: DFTX consolidating after a $700M upsized public offering at $34 — RSI at 90.7 is dangerously overbought with a Selling Climax signal on 3.33x volume; Jones Trading raised target to $74 but the offering dilution needs to digest.

news_catalyst.headline: Definium Therapeutics Prices Upsized $700M Public Offering at $34; Jones Trading Raises Target to $74
news_catalyst.summary: DFTX priced a massive $700M upsized public offering at $34 per share (over 20M new shares) — significant dilution. Jones Trading maintained Buy and raised the price target to $74 (65% upside), suggesting analysts remain bullish on the psychedelics biotech pipeline. However, RSI at 90.8 is extremely overbought, and the Selling Climax signal on 3.33x volume suggests the post-offering squeeze is exhausting near-term buyers. The HOLD signal has entry $43-$46, stop $38, target $55.54.

technical.summary: RSI at 90.8 is the most extreme overbought reading in the watchlist — a pullback is nearly certain in the near term. The Selling Climax signal on 3.33x volume with the stock at $44.95 (well above the $34 offering price) suggests early investors and institutions are distributing at a premium. Wyckoff Phase A-B with bullish bias is structurally positive, but RSI needs to cool to at least 60-65 before a new entry makes sense.

key_strengths: Jones Trading Buy with $74 target — 65% upside
Psychedelics drug pipeline with FDA potential
key_concerns: $700M dilutive offering creates near-term supply overhang
fundamentals.summary: Grade C fundamentals reflecting a pre-revenue biotech. The $700M offering provides runway but creates significant share dilution. Pipeline success is binary and speculative.

risks: RSI at 90.8 — extreme overbought; mean reversion to 60-65 RSI likely before continuation
$700M dilutive offering creates supply overhang as new shareholders look to take profits
Negative FCF — binary pipeline risk on clinical outcomes
Selling Climax signal on 3.33x volume suggests institutional distribution at current levels
